params_frozen.design_provenance: Designed 2026-05-04 after 17/17 completed pre-reg FAILs across 6 burnt classes (alt_data 6/6, options_implied 5/5, price_factor 4/4, multi_source 3/3, event_drift 2/2 BREADTH-FAIL, risk_overlay 1/1) plus 6 PROSPECTIVE/ABANDONED entries (n=23 in ledger). Cross-sectional attack surface on burnt 2024-04-30..2026-04-30 holdout empirically saturated. This experiment introduces a structurally novel attack surface: compound Layer 2 (Screener) x Layer 4 (Risk overlay) hypothesis per ADR 0007, using two feature spaces never touched in any prior experiment: us-gaap:Liabilities (leverage) via naive KMV Merton distance-to-default + ICE BofA US High Yield OAS macro regime gate.
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Perplexity Sonar Reasoning Pro (high effort, 2026-05-04) identified 2 FATAL flaws + 5 mitigable concerns. FATAL #1: HY OAS exposure mapping can invert in post-shock recovery regimes (2008-09, 2020) where wider spreads coincide with rising equity. Mitigation: pre-commit Phase A auto-pivot (A4-extended) drops Layer 4 from PRIMARY if overlay sanity check fails on TRAIN. FATAL #2: distress quintile threshold + HY OAS gate boundaries z=+/-1 are hyperparameters; implicit grid search would inflate n. Mitigation: locked to literature values (quintile 20% Fama-French standard; z=+/-1 1-sigma standard per Frazzini-Pedersen 2014 BAB; min exposure floor 0.5 per Moreira-Muir 2017 vol-target convention). Mitigable concerns documented in memo: naive KMV adequacy (Bharath-Shumway 2008 rho~0.95; Phase A descriptive Kendall-tau check), SP1500 PIT survivorship (~100-300bps/y, asymmetric favoring safe names), Carhart-4F vs 6F (4F primary, 6F descriptive sensitivity), FRED revision risk (HY OAS rarely revised >5bps), 2024-2026 regime unfavorability (mid-cap rally + spread compression + mega-cap-tech surge structurally suppress hypothesis; pass-prob revised 15-20%->8-12% ex-ante).
params_frozen.layer_architecture: Compound L2 x L4 per ADR 0007. L2 (Screener): Merton DD cross-sectional rank -> bottom quintile selection. L4 (Risk overlay): HY OAS z-score -> linear exposure interpolation [0.5, 1.0]. Compound hypothesis pays single Bonferroni (atomic experiment). Subsequent variants (e.g., L/S, different exposure floor) burn separate ledger entries.

merton_dd.V_definition: equity_mcap + total_liabilities (naive KMV; sigma_V approx sigma_E documented limitation per Bharath-Shumway 2008)
merton_dd.D_source: us-gaap:Liabilities (PIT filed_date <= asof, latest filed per period_end) from companyfacts parquet ~/.alphalens/companyfacts_parquet/
merton_dd.sigma_definition: annualized 60d realized daily log-return vol (np.log(close/close_prev).std() * sqrt(252))
merton_dd.score_direction: score = -PD; engine top_n picks lowest-PD names = safest

credit_regime_overlay.data_series_name: ICE BofA US High Yield Master OAS
credit_regime_overlay.z_score_strict_history: uses observations with date < asof only
credit_regime_overlay.literature_anchor: Frazzini-Pedersen 2014 BAB regime gate convention (1-sigma threshold). Min exposure floor 0.5 per Moreira-Muir 2017 vol-target convention (relaxed floor; M-M can de-lever further with 1/sigma^2 capped).
credit_regime_overlay.application_layer: OUTSIDE engine in experiment driver; does NOT modify scorer ranks. adjusted_returns(t) = exposure(t) * port_returns(t) + (1 - exposure(t)) * cash_rate(t)

universe_construction.mega_cap_metric: equity market cap at t (PIT shares * close[t])
universe_construction.distress_quintile_literature_anchor: Fama-French quintile standard (1993) + Bali-Cakici-Whitelaw 2011 MAX-effect convention + Frazzini-Pedersen 2014 BAB long-leg convention

params_frozen.selection_primary: long-only EQUAL-WEIGHT bottom-quintile by Merton PD (safest 20%). Adapter zeroes scores outside bottom quintile by PD; engine top_n=200 effectively unbounded relative to ~30-60 names in bottom quintile per asof.
params_frozen.selection_diagnostic_secondary: NONE in this iteration. L/S variant would be a separate pre-reg entry.
params_frozen.benchmark: SPY-residualized via Carhart-4F (parity with prior pre-regs); MDY descriptive secondary

phase_audit.phases_arg_added_to_audit_driver: scripts/audit_multi_phase.py adds --phases '0,4,8,12,16' subset selection (default would be range(stride)=range(21))

a4_extended_overlay_sanity_pre_commit.metric: correlation(spread_z_t, forward_21d_market_return_t+1:t+21) on TRAIN 2017-01..2024-04, rolling 60-month windows
a4_extended_overlay_sanity_pre_commit.pass_rule: full-sample mean correlation <= -0.05 AND no decade-window sign-drift > 0.4
a4_extended_overlay_sanity_pre_commit.fail_action: drop Layer 4 from PRIMARY; run pure-Layer-2 long-only safe-decile under same |t|>=3.50 threshold; Sharpe-improvement gate becomes descriptive-only (no overlay claim).

phase_a_gates.a6_ic_decay_pass_rule: rank-IC of -PD vs forward-21d returns is monotone non-zero

periods.rationale: Same burnt holdout as 23 prior entries (2024-04-30..2026-04-30). Window-shopping = HARKing per program policy. Burnt-holdout multiplicity escalation absorbed via threshold |t|>=3.50 (above naive program-level Bonferroni n=24 of 3.08; parity with event_drift_v4 escalation 3.34->3.50). TRAIN starts 2017-01 to capture post-companyfacts-availability era + 5y to amortize 60d vol estimation.

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart-4F alpha t-stat (HAC=5) on (overlay-adjusted-portfolio-return - SPY-return) holdout series, 5-phase robust mean
success_criteria.secondary_metric: Sharpe-improvement vs Carhart-4F-residualized SP1500 buy-hold baseline
success_criteria.bonferroni_escalation_rationale: Meta-multiplicity beyond naive Bonferroni (parity with event_drift_v4 3.34->3.50 precedent). Burnt holdout has been touched 23 times across 6 prior classes; cross-class implicit learning warrants escalation.
success_criteria.primary_pass_rule: Holdout multi-phase mean(alpha_t) >= 3.50 AND every-phase alpha_t >= 0 AND alpha_t_range across 5 phases <= 0.5 AND Sharpe-improvement >= 0.50 over Carhart-4F-residualized SP1500 baseline AND excess_net_ann dispersion <= 50pp
success_criteria.primary_mid_rule: 1.5 <= mean(alpha_t) < 3.50, OR 0.30 <= Sharpe-improvement < 0.50, OR alpha_t_range > 0.5 (with mean >= 1.5), OR excess_net_ann dispersion > 50pp (with mean >= 1.5)
success_criteria.primary_fail_rule: any phase alpha_t < 0, OR mean(alpha_t) < 1.5, OR Sharpe-improvement < 0.30
auto_pivot_triggers: Phase A coverage A2 < 80% mean -> ABORT pre-holdout-run; investigate companyfacts liabilities tagging gaps; ONE retry permitted with relaxed coverage gate (70%) IF and only if cause is data-engineering not signal

Phase A breadth A8 fails (scored < 100 OR bottom-quintile < 20) -> ABORT pre-holdout-run; SP1500 PIT loader insufficient for required cross-section; class CLOSED with breadth-fail (no Bonferroni burn)
Phase A overlay sanity A4-extended FAILS -> drop Layer 4 from PRIMARY; run pure-Layer-2 long-only safe-decile under same |t|>=3.50 threshold (PRE-COMMITTED auto-pivot, NOT post-hoc)
Holdout single-phase alpha_t < -1.5 -> ABORT pre-multi-phase; flag deep-loss diagnostic
ALL 5 phases negative alpha_t -> FAIL (regime fragility, distress puzzle inverted)
Naive vs iterative KMV Kendall-tau < 0.85 -> flag in verdict memo; escalates from descriptive to limitation
success_criteria.regime_stratification_postdoc: DESCRIPTIVE: report holdout alpha_t and Sharpe split by HY OAS z-score regime (high>+0.5 vs mid-range vs low<-0.5). Documents whether overlay added value across regimes. NOT a gate.
success_criteria.carhart_6f_descriptive_sensitivity: Report Carhart-4F + QMJ + BAB alpha t-stat as descriptive sensitivity. If 6F alpha_t drops by >1.0 below 4F alpha_t, flag in verdict as 'signal partially attributable to BAB/QMJ premia'. NOT a primary gate.
success_criteria.capital_deploy_clause: Capital deploy OFF-TABLE on this burnt holdout regardless of verdict per program-level burnt-holdout policy. PASS triggers prospective walk-forward replication on data accruing post-2026-04-30 at unadjusted p<0.05 single-test before any escalation.
